function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-30T10:47:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - claudia@helios-tax.example
subject: invoice copy needed
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_02_17__eur_000610__inv_0008__helios_backfill_rollout_week.md
related_entities:
  - entity.claudia
source_channel: 60_outbox/channels/helios_client_email.md
---
Hi Claudia,

Resending the requested invoice from 17-02-2026 for Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write completed. Verification: attachment path was read earlier, single attachment so ordering newest-first trivially satisfied, recipient matches canonical primary_contact_email. Subject has no colon-space so YAML-safe. Next finalize cleanup by deleting processed inbox file.
next_step.observation: Outbound email record was written to 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-30T10-47-00Z.md.

I processed lowest inbox file 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md, verified sender identity against canonical entity, read requested invoice dated 2026-02-17, created outbound email record in outbox with exact attachment, then deleted inbox item. function.message: Processed the next inbox item by preparing an outbound resend email to Claudia with the requested 2026-02-17 Helios invoice attached, then removed the handled inbox message.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), read nested AGENTS/workflow docs for inbox + email sending, verified sender via canonical primary_contact_email, used exact workspace attachment path, and deleted inbox item only after completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox email requested resending one specific invoice (17-02-2026 from Helios). Canonical entity file confirmed sender identity match (claudia@helios-tax.example). Invoice file with issued_on 2026-02-17 and Helios counterparty was read and attached in outbound record 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-30T10-47-00Z.md. Inbox item was then deleted per inbox workflow cleanup rule.
